parents.subject: LU-9312 hsm: release restore lock without object

commit.subject: LU-9433 test: rerun sanity-scrub to reproduce it
commit.message:
LU-9433 test: rerun sanity-scrub to reproduce it

This is a for test only patch. Rerun the test with
per-subtest setup/cleanup enabled.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,SETUP=setup,CLEANUP=cleanup \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 \
testlist=sanity-scrub,sanity-scrub,sanity-scrub,sanity-scrub,sanity-scrub

Change-Id: I66d26b68b652279d2da3fbb415e93715c6325973
Signed-off-by: Wei Liu <wei3.liu@intel.com>
